subcodes.first_line: O Abdullah! He Who is the Forerunner in the arena of inner meanings and utterance, and the One Who hath dyed all created things, speaketh thus concerning [3.5s]... ...O servant of God! The One Who is the Master of utterance and meaning, and colors all created things, sayeth: Meditate on that which We have revealed aforetime
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالله سباق میدان معانی و بیان و صباغ من فی الامکان میفرماید در آنچه از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @metallurgical metaphors, @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
